markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Leo Ostigard records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Norway vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Norway vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Leo Ostigard: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tommy Edman records 2+ RBIs in Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 9:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Tommy Edman is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tommy Edman starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tommy Edman is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Tommy Edman is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
markets.title: Tommy Edman: 2+ RBIs?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Yujia Huang wins the Cirpanli vs Huang professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA 125K Istanbul 2 Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Cirpanli vs Huang professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA 125K Istanbul 2 Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Yujia Huang win the Cirpanli vs Huang: Qualification Round 1 match?

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jacob Wilson is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jacob Wilson starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jacob Wilson is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Jacob Wilson is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Jacob Wilson: 1+ hits + runs + RBIs?
